roa.docketEntryComment: REQ ADD CRIM CALENDAR TO TAKE OFF ELECTRONIC MONITORING FOR MRI - FILED
DEFENSE ATTORNEY MOT TO RELEASE ON GPS/ACMFILED TODAY
DEF ADD TO CALENDAR MOTION TO DECLARE A CONFLICT FILED AT INSISTENCE
/CAL: TO SET APD PRCS AND TRAILING 21001098/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT HAS RECEIVEDA POSITIVE REPORT,/3455REIN/CTORD: DEPAUL DATE IS 01-01-2023/X: NO FUTURE COURT DATES,/

/CAL: MODIFICATION OF RELEASE CONDITIONS AND TO SET APD MTR PRCS/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO IMMEDIATELY REPORT TO SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE PRCS/X: DEFENDANT HAS A POSITIVE ASSERTIVE CASE MANAGEMENT REPORT/EMMOD: DEFENDANT TO HAVE GPS REMOVED TODAY FOR MEDICAL PROCEDURE ON 02-26-22/CONTD: TO SET APD MTR PRCS & STATUS/DOP/

/CAL: MOTION TO TAKE OFF ELECTRONIC MONITORING FOR MRI/X: DEFENDANT HAS ASCHEDULED MRI ON 02-26-22 & IS REQUESTING TO HAVE GPS REMOVED FOR THE PROCEDURE/X: THE FUTURE COURT DATE OF 02-24-22 IS CONFIRMED & IS ON CALENDAR FOR TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE PRCS & REMOVAL OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE PRCS/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:ACM PROGRESS REPORT AND TO SET APD MTR PRCS/DOP/
/CAL:ATTORNEY DECLARATION OF CONFLICT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLICDEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:SILAS GENESON/X:DA MTR SETTINGON 11-23-21 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL: TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE PRCS & MODIFICATION OF RELEASE CONDITIONS/EMTERM/OR/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE PRCS/DAWT/CONT/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM,/
/CAL:TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE PRCS/DAWT/CONT/DOPU:POSITIVE ACM REPORT,/
/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/DAWT/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/CONT/DOP/
/CAL: APD 3455PC MOT/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S20/TBH:21011098/PROB ADM REV/N
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOT/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 12/TRANS 12:FORTHWITH FOR AN ON APD 3455PC & JOIN 21011098 AT 130PM/
